case_title: MERCY SERVICES CORPORATION VS. DOROTHY SMITH et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT DOROTHY SMITH IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT DOROTHY SMITH AND RONNIE MOORE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND; NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE 5 DAYS TO FILE ITS 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. JUDGE: JAMES L. RULING:
Defendant Dorothy Smith is not present. DEFENDANT DOROTHY SMITH and RONNIE MOORE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: SUSTAINED with leave to amend; no opposition filed. Plaintiff shall have 5 days to file its 2nd amended complaint. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
